seo.title: Shopify vs Medusa vs Saleor
seo.description: A practical comparison of Shopify, Medusa, and Saleor for E-Commerce.

content.intro: Comparing headless commerce platforms for e-commerce developers focusing on implementation, flexibility, and integration trade-offs.

options.name: Shopify Hydrogen
options.best_for: Rapid storefront development with Shopify ecosystem integration

options.name: Medusa
options.best_for: Customizable commerce solutions with self-hosting flexibility

options.name: Saleor
options.tagline: Open-source e-commerce platform with GraphQL API

criteria.name: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time and complexity to build a functional storefront

criteria.name: Cost Profile
criteria.description: Ongoing financial commitment for infrastructure and licensing

values.Medusa: Low (self-hosted, open-source with optional SaaS features)
values.Saleor: Low (open-source, self-hosted with optional enterprise support)

criteria.name: Reliability
criteria.description: Uptime, performance, and stability under load

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Support for AI-driven features like product descriptions

criteria.name: Payment Integration
criteria.description: Regional payment processor support and tax handling

criteria.name: Performance Optimization
criteria.description: Handling product pages with heavy media and filters

verdict.summary: Shopify Hydrogen offers the fastest development path but with higher lock-in and cost. Medusa and Saleor provide greater flexibility but require more engineering effort. Medusa's open-source model and modern architecture make it ideal for custom solutions, while Saleor's GraphQL focus suits enterprise-scale projects.

use_cases.scenario: Rapid storefront deployment with minimal customization
use_cases.reason: Leverages Shopify's infrastructure and pre-built components for quick time-to-market
Open-source architecture allows complete control over codebase and deployment
Built-in multi-tenancy support and GraphQL API for complex enterprise requirements
